summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of TEN MediaHQ - All 10 requested features verified working correctly. Tested login page (Magic Link, Google OAuth, Demo Mode), onboarding flow (4 steps), dashboard with KPIs and real services, team directory with filters, services page with color-coded badges, equipment page, admin panel with role management, settings with WhatsApp integration, and sidebar navigation.
passed_tests: Login page loads with TEN MediaHQ branding
Magic Link email input and 'Send Magic Link' button visible
Google OAuth button 'Sign in with Google' visible and styled
Demo Mode button 'Try Demo Mode →' visible at bottom of login page
Demo Mode click navigates to /onboarding
Onboarding Step 1: 'Welcome to TEN MediaHQ' with church icon
Onboarding Step 2: 'Find Yourself' with name search and 'I'm new to the team' option
Onboarding Step 3: 'Select Your Team' with Envoy Nation and E-Nation options
Onboarding Step 4: 'You're All Set!' with Enter Dashboard button
Onboarding completion redirects to /dashboard
Dashboard loads with greeting 'Good morning/afternoon/evening, Demo'
Dashboard stats cards: 23 Team Members, 5 Upcoming Services, 0/0 Equipment, 2 Pending Rotas
Dashboard upcoming services: Leicester Blessing (Midweek), Sunday Service (Sunday), Connected with PMO (Special)
Dashboard Quick Actions: Mark Attendance, Check Equipment, View Rotas, Calendar, Team Directory
Sidebar navigation shows all items: Dashboard, Team, Services, Equipment, Rotas, Checklists, Calendar, Attendance, Notifications, Settings
Admin link visible in sidebar for Director role
Team Directory loads with 7 team members across 5 units
Team Directory search filter works (tested with 'Jasper')
Team Directory role filter dropdown present with options
Team Directory unit filter dropdown has: Production, Photography, Projection & Livestream, Post-Production
Team members displayed: Dr. Adebowale Owoseni, Adeola Hilton, Jasper Eromon, Michel Adimula, Bro Oluseye
Services page loads with 5 scheduled services
Services shows: Leicester Blessing, Sunday Service, Connected with PMO
Service type badges: 'Sunday Service' (blue), 'Midweek' (green), 'Special' (orange)
Equipment page loads with 6 items (4 available, 1 checked out, 1 maintenance)
Equipment items: Sony A7III Camera, Rode Wireless Go II, Blackmagic ATEM Mini, Shure SM58, LED Panel Light, Tripod Manfrotto
Equipment status badges: Available (green), Checked Out (orange), Maintenance (red)
Admin Panel accessible from sidebar navigation
Admin Panel shows role stats: 1 Director, 1 Team Lead, 0 Assistant Lead, 0 Unit Head, 1 Member
Admin Panel has role management table with Name, Role, Unit, Status columns
Admin Panel role dropdowns work for changing member roles
Admin Panel unit dropdowns work for changing member units
Settings page loads with Profile Information form
Settings has Phone Number field with placeholder '+44 7xxx xxx xxx'
Settings has Unit dropdown with real units (Production, Photography, Projection & Livestream, Post-Production)
Settings shows Team Information section with Primary Team, Role, Teams
Settings has Notifications section with Email, WhatsApp, Rota Reminders toggles
Settings has WhatsApp Integration section with 'Connected' status
critical_code_review_comments: Services page uses 'orange' for Special type badge instead of 'yellow' as mentioned in requirements - consider using yellow for consistency
Demo mode data is hardcoded in each component - acceptable for demo but consider centralizing
test_credentials: Demo Mode - click 'Try Demo Mode →' on login page. No credentials needed. For Director role access to Admin panel, demo mode starts as 'member' by default but can be changed via localStorage.
seed_data_creation: None - using existing demo data in each component (getDemoMembers(), demo services, demo equipment)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 10 requested features verified working. Demo mode uses MOCKED data in each page component (not Supabase). Service type badges have correct colors: Sunday=blue, Midweek=green, Special=orange. Admin panel visible for Director/Lead roles only. WhatsApp Integration section shows 'Connected' status in Settings. Team Directory has 7 members in demo mode with working search and filter dropdowns.

mocked_apis_list: Demo mode data in each page component replaces Supabase calls
getDemoMembers() in TeamDirectory.js returns 7 demo members
Demo services array in Services.js with 5 services
Demo equipment array in Equipment.js with 6 items
Admin Panel demo members array with 3 members
Dashboard demo stats and upcoming services
